biz.title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
biz.summary: An AI agent carried out the technical execution of a real-world ransomware attack for the first known time, but new details show a human still chose the victim, set up the infrastructure, and supplied stolen credentials — meaning it wasn't quite the fully autonomous cybercrime debut that last week's

biz.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
biz.summary: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.

biz.title: Every major tech layoff in 2026 that has name-checked AI
biz.summary: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

biz.title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
biz.summary: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google’s privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as “images, files, and audio and video recordings,” to improve its AI models.

biz.title: Station F ramps up as a launchpad for Europe’s hottest AI startups
biz.summary: Station F, a Paris-based startup hub founded by French billionaire Xavier Niel, is gearing up for a new edition of its F/ai accelerator program in a bid to strengthen its positioning as a stepping stone for promising AI startups.

biz.title: Smart glasses maker Even Realities hits $1B valuation with $150M funding led by Meituan, Tencent
biz.summary: Even Realities, an ex-Apple team building camera-free smart glasses, raised $150 million from Meituan and Tencent at a $1 billion valuation.
